description:
All state diagrams show 42% color match. Selkie uses wrong fill colors:
- Uses #ffffcc/#ffffde instead of #fff5ad (note/label backgrounds)
- Uses #666666 instead of #333 (text/dark elements)
- Uses #ffffff instead of 'white' (semantically same but eval flags it)
- Missing: black, #552222, #131300, #e0e0e0

Compare fill colors in src/render/state.rs with reference styles in reference-implementations/mermaid/packages/mermaid/src/diagrams/state/styles.ts

Affects all 4 state eval diagrams.
title: State: fix fill color palette to match mermaid.js reference
